title: CAU Imphal ORDINANCE 2 of 2005
text: }To be published in the Gazette of India, Part-Ill, Sectior I) GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH AND EDUCATION CENTRAL AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY IMPHAL : MANIPUR ORDINANCE Imphal, the 19 th November , 2005 No. 2 of 2005 No. CAU/Reg/584/Ord/05.. - Whereas the approved Expenditure Finance Committee Memo along with addendum in respect of the sanction of the Central Agricultural University Scheme under the VIII th Five Year Plan as. communicated. by the Joint Secretary, Department of. Agricultural Research and Education and Secretary, Indian Council of Agricultural Research vide their letter number 1(2)/92-P1 and M (Part-III). dated 13th October. 1993 provides for the establishment of a College of Agricultural Engineering and Post harvest :Technology in Sikkim as a constituent College of the Central Agricultural University. Imphal And whereas the administrative approval. and financial sanction for X Plan proposal has been communicated by Department of Agricultural Research and Education vide letter no. 5-4/2002-CAU dated 4.3.2005 and 5-4/2002-CAU dated 18.3.2005 respectively. And whereas the Government of Sikkim has transferred the land measuring 4.6800 hectare at Marchak Zn Sikkim for establishment of College of Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology as a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal vide letter no. 83/Ag/Engg dated 23.6.05. And whereas the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education has approved the issue/making of an Ordinance for the establishment of College of Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology in Sikkim 'as a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal vide letter No. 5-8 / 2005-CAU dated 11.11.2005. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (viii) of section 5 and sub-section (2) read with clauses (k) and (o) of sub-section (1) of section 27 of the Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 (40 of 1992) and with the previous approval of the Central Government, I, the Vice-Chancellor, Central Agricultural University, Imphal do hereby make the first ordinance and notify the following provisions for the N. -- 1 of 3 -- • or Bachelor of Science •or Bachelor of Science(Agriculture) followed by Master's Li.azree in cuinpuna- application . i i ) Cleared the National Eligibility Test for Assistant Professor/ Lecturer conducted by University Grants Commission /Council of Scientific and Industrial Research/Indian Council of Agricultural Research or similar test accredited by University Grants Commission (relaxable in case the National Eligibility Test qualified candidates are not available). However, such candidate shall have to clear National Eligibility, Test within 3 years. (S.N. Puri) Vice-Chancellor -- 2 of 3 -- (i) Master's degree in Computer Application from a University or equivalent degree from foreign University with at least 55% marks in traditional system or Overall Grade Point Average of 2.75 in 4 point scale or 7 in 10 point scale with consistent good academic record. 3. Assistant Professor Essential: (Computer Science) higher education: fifteen years administrative e perience. of which 8 years experience as Deputy Registrar or an equivalent post. Failing which Deputation If an Indian Administrative Service officer is taken on deputation , he should have put in at least 9' years of service. 2. Comptroller Essential for direct recruitment: (A) Chartered Accountant Or (i) at least second class graduate or a postgraduate ; and (ii) must have passed SAS examination held by the Comptroller and Auditor General of India/State Finance Department/Indian Council of Agricultural Research. B) Must have 12 years experience in a supervisory capacity in financial management/administration out of which, he must have five years experience of Accounts Officer/Deputy Registrar or equivalent in Government office/institution preferably in a University. Failing which Deputation: If an officer of the Indian Audit and Accounts service is taken on deputation as a Comptroller, he should have put in at least 9 years experience in that service.
